title: ShapeCode34
description: ShapeCode34: A reinforcement bar with shape code 34 to BS 8666:2020 in the XY Plane with the free end of the A segment starting at the Origin aligned the X axis, the C/F parameters aligned with the X axis and the D/E parameters aligned with the Y axis.

A.description: Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

B.description: Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

C.description: Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

D.description: Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

E.description: Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

F.description: Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Diameter.description: The diameter of the reinforcement bar. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

BendRadius.description: Bend radius used for any discontinuities in the CentreCurve. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
